measurement_note: Size is the requested position n with fixed divisors a = 2 and b = 3. Inclusion-exclusion binary search takes O(log n) time, while a correct two-stream merge emits and deduplicates every magical number through position n in O(n) time.

cases.name: benchmark: locate magical number 128 for divisors two and three
benchmark: locate magical number 2048 for divisors two and three
benchmark: locate magical number 32768 for divisors two and three
